name: Gengu Survival
short_description: Survive on an open-world island with unlockable abilities that help you on your journey in Gengu Survival. Craft new items as you level up and build your own base wherever you want. But be aware, there is something strange on this island...
detailed_description: Gengu Survival is an open world survival game located in an island filled with resources you can use for numerous things. The game features crafting, base building, first-person elements (FPS) and unlockable special abilites which help you on your journey through the island. Explore realistic looking biomes and always keep track on your health as you move, since you might want to eat or drink something regularly or take damage from enemies. This game was made following the course from SmartPoly. Make your own game with his amazing Unreal Engine courses.
